tests_run.stdin: - Runner constructor : - Runner(json signature ) public methods : - json runSubmission(json data, std::string & submissionCode ) signature will hold the defintion of the public method signature that the submitted code should expose. data will be any arbitrary json array. Each entry of the array must match the provided input parameters for public method. submissionCode is a string that holds the code submitted by user, which should define the class and public method defined in signature .
